## [Note]

dbbot v0.4.0 is the next official release after v0.3.0. It improves control-host bootstrap, VIP-related pre-flight validation, and release upgrade observability for curated-package users.

## [Add]

- Add a shared MySQL pre-task that validates configured network interfaces on each host before Router HA, MHA, keepalived master-slave, and GreatSQL HA VIP-related roles run.
- Add `--debug` to `dbbotctl release upgrade` and `dbbotctl release rollback` so release stage progress is printed and post-checks can be streamed live to the terminal.

## [Change]

- Update the local curated-package build script to include untracked, non-ignored working-tree files and skip paths that no longer exist, so local package builds better match the current filesystem state.

## [Fix]

- Make `setup_portable_ansible.sh` register `/usr/local/dbbot/bin` in `PATH` idempotently so `dbbotctl` is available after the control-host environment bootstrap.
- Replace the MySQL control-host `tar` prerequisite install flow with delegated local raw commands to avoid Python yum/dnf binding failures during package validation.
- Fail earlier in VIP-related MySQL playbooks when the configured network interface does not exist on a target host, instead of failing later during VIP bind or keepalived verification.
